## Outcome

Describe the user-visible result and why it is needed.

## Validation

List the exact checks run and label proof as local, live-provider, container, hosted, or production.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and includes appropriate tests.
- [ ] `make check` and relevant evaluations pass.
- [ ] User, extension, or safety documentation is updated when behavior changes.
- [ ] Tool output and external content remain untrusted by default.
- [ ] Approval, workspace, memory, and evidence boundaries are preserved or reviewed explicitly.
- [ ] No credentials, private data, local state, or sensitive logs are included.
